title: astragalus bejourensis
intro: Astragalus bejourensis, also known as Bejourensis milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus bejourensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus bejourensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and decoctions, which are often consumed in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
